summary: Completed iteration 18 testing for MBHS default operator, expense deadlines, and promo features. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirms MBHS is pre-selected, no 'Non assegnato' column exists, and promos are visible/clickable on both /prenota and /sito pages.

issues: Expense deadlines section only shows UPCOMING expenses (>= today), not overdue ones. Overdue expenses appear on PlanningPage banner instead. This may be intentional design but could confuse users who expect to see all unpaid expenses in Agenda.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All MBHS features verified: 1) MBHS is default operator on Planning and Agenda new appointment forms, 2) No 'Non assegnato' column in Planning, 3) Expense deadlines banner shows overdue expenses on Planning page (3 overdue totaling €1300), 4) Agenda shows upcoming expenses only (none currently since all are past due), 5) 8 active promotions visible and clickable on both /prenota and /sito pages, 6) Backend auto-assigns first operator when creating appointment without operator_id.

features_tested.PlanningPage_no_unassigned_column: PASS - Only Bruno Melito and MBHS columns visible
features_tested.PlanningPage_MBHS_default: PASS - MBHS pre-selected in new appointment dialog
features_tested.AppointmentsPage_expense_deadlines: PASS - Feature implemented, but only shows future due dates. Overdue shown on Planning banner.
features_tested.AppointmentsPage_MBHS_default: PASS - MBHS pre-selected in new appointment form
features_tested.BookingPage_promos_visible: PASS - 8 promos visible in 'Promozioni & Card' section
features_tested.BookingPage_promos_clickable: PASS - Clicking promo shows toast 'Promo X aggiunta!'
features_tested.WebsitePage_promos_visible: PASS - 8 promos visible in 'Promozioni Attive' section with codes
features_tested.Backend_auto_assign_operator: PASS - POST /api/appointments auto-assigns operator when none provided
features_tested.Login_flow: PASS - Successfully logs in with provided credentials
